description: The Talon community command set is installed at C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\community. Update C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TalonTasks\my_commands.talon to include three custom voice commands: 'open downloads' to trigger the Ctrl+J keyboard shortcut, 'say hello world' to insert the text 'Hello, World!', and 'clear line' to select and delete the current line.
